characters.name: Rie Nishida
characters.description: Rie NishidaBiographical InformationRace:HumanGender:FemaleStatus:DeceasedCharacter InformationOccupation:Chief ResearcherReal World InformationVoice Actor:Sakiko Tamagawa(Japanese)Gwendolyn Lau(English) Gwendolyn Lau(English) Dr. Rie Nishida(西田 りえNishida Rie) is the amoral chief researcher of theNSWFwho is extremely obsessed with researching the capabilities of theWitchbladeand cared little for any laws or restrictions that would be placed on her experiments.
